shell.profileErrorBody: The connection to the server failed or timed out. Check your internet connection, then try again.
shell.profileNotFoundBody: Your account is authenticated ({{email}}) but no profile is associated with it. Sign in again or contact the staff.
shell.profileIncompleteBody: Your account ({{email}}) is authenticated, but its setup is incomplete (missing role or club link). Contact the staff to finalise your access.
shell.readOnlyBanner: Read-only mode — coach. Full club view, no editing.
shell.playerNotLinked: Your player profile isn't linked to the squad yet. Contact the staff.

joueur.title: Welcome 👋
joueur.text: This is your player space. A few screens to show you the essentials. You can skip this tour at any time.

joueur.title: Your daily check-in
joueur.text: Every day, fill in your morning check-in (well-being, sleep, weight) and your evening one. It's the basis of your monitoring and readiness.

joueur.title: Your sessions
joueur.text: Find your scheduled sessions, complete them and log how you felt (RPE, loads). Staff sees your progress live.

joueur.title: Challenges
joueur.text: Take on challenges set by the staff to earn bonus points. You can also decline a challenge that doesn't suit you.

joueur.title: The leaderboard
joueur.text: Check-ins, sessions, activities and challenges earn you points. Climb the divisions and compare yourself to your team.

joueur.title: Where I stand
joueur.text: Compare your physical tests to your team and line averages, with the Top 14 marker. It's up to you to aim higher!

staff.title: Welcome 👋
staff.text: This is your staff space. A quick tour of the main sections — skippable at any time.

staff.title: Your players
staff.text: The squad, detailed profiles (physical tests, weight, ×BW) and adding players are all managed from the Players screen.

staff.title: Monitoring
staff.text: Readiness, load, ACWR and alerts flag who to watch. Handle alerts or forward them to the physio.

staff.title: Programs & camps
staff.text: Create programs, schedule camps and test campaigns, and assign it all to your players.

staff.title: Challenges
staff.text: Launch configurable challenges (points, two-step validation) to motivate and energise the group.

staff.title: Comparison
staff.text: Compare two players, or a player to the team / line average, across the 9 tests (table, bars, radar, Top 14 marker).

player.title: Where do I stand?
player.intro: Your values per test compared to your team or line average, with the Top 14 marker. Only averages are shown — never a teammate's values.
player.noTestBody: Your results will appear here after your next physical assessment.

meditation.title: Meditation & Relaxation
meditation.subtitle: Take a moment for yourself: breathing, deep relaxation and short sessions to unwind and recover better.

reward.points: +10 pts for a session done today

meditation.footer: Find a quiet place, get comfortable, and let yourself be guided. One session a day is enough to feel the benefits.

jacobson.releaseHint: Release completely. Feel the relaxation spread through the area.

hands.label: Hands & forearms
hands.hint: Clench your fists, tense your forearms.

shoulders.label: Shoulders & neck
shoulders.hint: Raise your shoulders towards your ears.

face.label: Face
face.hint: Close your eyes, scrunch your forehead and jaw.

back.label: Back
back.hint: Draw your shoulder blades together, arch slightly.

player.doneSub: Take a moment before getting back to your activity.

jacobson.title: Muscle relaxation (Jacobson)
jacobson.subtitle: Tense then release each muscle group

schultz.label: Settle in
schultz.text: Get comfortable, close your eyes. Let your body become heavy and still.

schultz.label: Heaviness
schultz.text: My right arm is heavy… my whole body becomes heavy, relaxed, let go.

schultz.label: Warmth
schultz.text: A gentle warmth spreads through my arms and legs. My limbs are warm and heavy.

schultz.label: Calm heart
schultz.text: My heart beats calmly and steadily. Peaceful, quiet.

schultz.label: Breathing
schultz.text: My breathing is calm and free. It breathes within me, effortlessly.

schultz.label: Solar plexus
schultz.text: My solar plexus is warm, my belly is relaxed and soft.

schultz.label: Cool forehead
schultz.text: My forehead is cool and clear. My mind is calm and rested.

schultz.label: Return
schultz.text: Become aware of your body again. Gently move your fingers, stretch, open your eyes.

prematch.label: Grounding
prematch.text: Breathe deeply. Feel your footing on the ground, solid and stable.

prematch.label: Activation
prematch.text: Breathe in energy, feel your body wake up, ready for the effort.

prematch.label: Focus
prematch.text: Picture your first successful move. You are focused, present, confident.

prematch.label: Ready
prematch.text: Three powerful breaths. You are ready. Let's go.

postmatch.label: Let go
postmatch.text: The effort is over. Release your shoulders, jaw, hands.

postmatch.label: Breath
postmatch.text: Breathe slowly, let your heart rate come down.

postmatch.label: Recovery
postmatch.text: Feel the relaxation reach your legs, your arms. Your body recovers.

postmatch.label: Gentle review
postmatch.text: Note one positive thing about your performance. Then let go.

sleep.label: Slow down
sleep.text: Close your eyes. Let the day drift away, without holding on.

sleep.label: Weight
sleep.text: Your body sinks into the mattress, heavier and heavier.

sleep.label: Long breath
sleep.text: Lengthen each exhale. Sleep comes on its own.

sleep.label: Drift
sleep.text: Nothing to do, nothing to think. Let yourself drift away.

stress.label: Acknowledge
stress.text: Name what you feel, without judging it. It's just tension.

stress.label: Breath
stress.text: Breathe out slowly, twice as long as the inhale.

stress.label: Release
stress.text: With each exhale, release a tense area: shoulders, belly, forehead.

stress.label: Refocus
stress.text: Come back to the present moment. One thing you see, one you hear.

taches.title: My tasks
taches.emptyHint: Your staff will assign some here (each validated task = +2 points).

defis.title: Challenges
defis.emptyHint: Your staff will post some here — take them on to earn points and badges.
defis.declineConfirm:
Don't take part in the challenge “{{title}}”?
It will leave your active challenges (no points lost).
defis.refused: 🚫 You're not taking part in this challenge.

quest.title: Questionnaires
quest.emptyHint: Your staff will send some here (health, profile…).

seances.emptyHint: Your S&C coach will send your program here.

crew.allInvited: All your teammates are already in the team or invited.
crew.createHint: Form a team with your club friends. A banner is drawn at random, and your points add up on the team leaderboard.
crew.errAlreadyTeam: This player is already in a team.
